Density.$Comment: NATURAL ROLLING TERRAIN (1C): the two flat-core Cylinder masks (r70) are REMOVED so hills + caves apply across the whole footprint; only the r112 edge-cliff Cylinder remains (the finite-world boundary the design keeps). All-additive + fail-safe: any optional term degrading to ConstantValueDensity(0.0) just drops that feature; no top-level Min/Max, so the ground never airs out. Sign law: density >0 SOLID, <=0 (incl 0.0) AIR; surface = zero-crossing. HAND-TRACE (any x,z): density = wideRamp(y) + hillNoise(x,z) + caveCarve + edgeCliff. wideRamp = CurveMapper[In:-40->1, In:40->-1] over (y-80), slope -0.025/blk, crosses 0 at y=80 (top-solid y=79, stand y=80), clamps to +1 below y=40 and -1 above y=120. hillNoise in [-0.20,+0.20] shifts the zero-crossing by noise/slope = +-8 blocks, so the surface rolls between ~y=72 (valley) and ~y=88 (hilltop). +-0.20 << the ramp's 1.0 clamp so density stays negative above the surface (NO solid-to-sky flood) and positive below (no floating gaps). Caves carve only y<66 (depthMask) where |noise3D|<0.15 (pocketMask), 6+ blocks below the lowest valley surface so they never breach the walkable floor. Beyond r112 the edge term adds -100000 = sheer cliff into the void. EXPECTED SURFACE Y RANGE: ~72..88 across the footprint (mean 80).

Inputs.$Comment: Hill noise applied EVERYWHERE except a SMALL r6 spawn clearing (the ruined courtyard) so the player spawns on flat, deterministic ground at y80 matching instance SpawnPoint.Y - this is a tiny clearing, NOT the old r70 flat disc. The Cylinder is 0 inside r6 and ramps to full hills by r12 (smooth courtyard edge); origin-centered, which is exactly where spawn is. +-0.20 amplitude -> +-8 block hills under the -0.025/blk ramp slope; well under the ramp's 1.0 clamp so no solid-to-sky flood. A Multiplier degrading to 0 -> flat ground, never an air-out.

EDGE CLIFF (finite-world boundary): 0 inside r112, -100000 beyond (sheer cliff into the void). The old procedural cave-noise term (a Multiplier carving |noise3D|<0.15 air pockets below y66) was REMOVED - it hollowed pockets nobody interacts with and generated with no lower depth bound; the descend-and-return cave SHRINES are unaffected (the runtime Relight_Shaft + the worldgen KN_ShrineDungeon force-carve their own space). See the ISLAND FLOOR term below for the finite-slab bottom.

ISLAND FLOOR (shorter island): the VERTICAL analogue of the r112 edge-cliff term. Over BaseHeight 'Base' Distance:true (= y-80) it contributes 0 at/above y~36 (In>=-44) and -100000 below it (In<=-50), carving a flat UNDERSIDE so the grove is a FINITE slab (rolling surface ~y72-88 down to ~y36) floating over the void, NOT a solid column to bedrock. floorY ~36 stays below the deepest kept underground feature (runtime cave chambers ~y65, worldgen KN_ShrineDungeon descent ~y44). All-additive + fail-safe like the rest of the Sum. Tunable: raise both In points together to thin the slab once/if the deep dungeon is dropped.

Props.$Comment: TREE COLLISION FIX (Runtime 1): trees run in a LATER prop runtime than the structures (which stay Runtime 0). PropStage copies the previous runtime's material output as this runtime's input (PropStage.run:180), so a Runtime-1 tree READS the placed Runtime-0 crypts/houses/ruins; its Floor pattern (Soil_Grass_Dry under Empty) then FAILS on a structure footprint (now rock/brick) and the tree skips it, instead of growing through the building. Trees still place normally on open grass. 1C: ambient blight trees scattered by WORLDGEN (replaces the runtime ArenaBuilder foliage ring, per the design's 'trees from worldgen, not manual paste'). A sparse Mesh2D grid of weighted native dead/poisoned tree prefabs (FULL ATMOSPHERIC PASS: ash/poisoned/petrified/burnt-dead stages plus rare Ash_twisted Large/Giant canopy landmarks; density unchanged, only the variety widened - all paths verified to resolve to native prefab folders), floor-snapped to the rolling surface by the ColumnLinear scanner; BlockMask.DontReplace keeps trunks from gouging the soil. A malformed Prefab prop fails the WHOLE biome decode (= all air), so this mirrors the proven vanilla Example_Prop 'Hills' Prefab-prop shape exactly. Validate in-game (the biome JSON is not gradle-compiled).

TRACK A (cycle 3): SPARSE corrupted-structure ruins scattered gen-time among the dead trees. CLONED from Props[0] (the Type:Prefab tree-scatter prop) and repointed at the committed KweebecNightmare/Corrupted_* structures, so it mirrors the proven Prefab-prop shape exactly (a malformed Prefab prop fails the WHOLE biome decode = all air; validate in-game, this JSON is not gradle-compiled). MUCH sparser than the trees: Mesh ScaleX/Y/Z 48 (vs the trees' 16) plus SkipChance 0.85 means only a handful of ruins land, biased to the outer grove since the structures are big (the small Lamppost / House / Bridge are weighted highest, the large Shop / GuardTower / Well rarest). LoadEntities:false so the native NPC_Spawn_Marker / NPC_Path_Marker entities baked into the source villages never spawn (the Corrupted_* files already zero entities; this is belt-and-suspenders at the scatter layer too). DontReplace placement guard: the ColumnLinear scanner floor-snaps onto the rolling surface and the Floor pattern only accepts a column standing on Soil_Grass_Dry under Empty, so a ruin never gouges existing soil or floats in the air; we DROP the trees' +8 air-offset headroom check because these structures are tall and do not need clear sky at exactly +8 blocks. Random directionality rotates each ruin. Jitter 0.5 (the <=0.5 BiomeAsset cap). IN-GAME GATE: pack-authored Corrupted_* prefab-folder resolution during worldgen scatter is unverified here; confirm the keys resolve and the footprints do not bury/float badly on rolling terrain.

Runtime 1 (same as trees) so debris reads the placed Runtime-0 structures and its Floor pattern skips their footprints instead of landing logs on/through the crypts + houses. FULL ATMOSPHERIC PASS: forest-floor DEBRIS - fallen logs, stumps, petrified logs, mossy boulders strewn through the dead grove for cover + decay texture. CLONED from the Corrupted_* ruins prop (the proven Type:Prefab scatter shape; a malformed Prefab prop fails the WHOLE biome decode = all air), repointed at verified native prefab folders (each folder resolves to a random child variant). Sparser than trees (Mesh Scale 14 + SkipChance 0.7). LoadEntities:false; the Floor pattern + ColumnLinear scanner floor-snap each piece onto Soil_Grass_Dry under Empty so nothing gouges soil or floats; Random rotation. Validate in-game (this JSON is not gradle-compiled).

FULL ATMOSPHERIC PASS: rare GRAVES + RELICS - Cursed Crypt tombstones + a warning sign-post seeded sparsely as haunted set-dressing. The big Crypt_Entrance set-piece is deliberately NOT scattered here (it carves a deep pit; a random drop onto a shrine/spawn would break the chase) - that stays on the runtime, ExclusionMask-protected seam. CLONED from the ruins prop shape. Very sparse (Mesh Scale 40 + SkipChance 0.85). LoadEntities:false; Floor pattern + ColumnLinear floor-snap; Random rotation. Validate in-game.

ATMOSPHERE CLUSTERS (native prefab-stitching): composed multi-prefab set-dressing via Child_Prefabs / Prefab_Spawner_Block. Each cluster parent (KweebecNightmare/Cluster_Deadfall, Cluster_Rubble) embeds Prefab_Spawner_Block markers the worldgen PrefabProp path harvests + recursively pastes (decompile-verified: builtin.hytalegenerator.props.deprecated.prefab.PrefabProp harvests prefab.getChildPrefabs() at construction and pastes each child in place(); that branch is taken because this prop carries Scanner+Directionality). Children are confirmed-resolving native debris (Trees/Cedar_Logs, Fir_Logs, Petrified_Logs, Autumn_Stumps); each child carries FitHeightmap:true so it self-snaps to the rolling surface (no float/gouge). SPARSER than the lone-debris pass (Mesh 40 + SkipChance 0.8) so a handful of intentional rubble/deadfall piles read among the single debris. CLONED from the proven debris Prefab-prop shape; LoadEntities:false; Floor pattern + ColumnLinear floor-snaps the cluster anchor, Random rotation turns the whole cluster. IN-GAME GATE: (1) biome still generates (not all-air), (2) clusters appear as grouped debris, (3) the @Tech Prefab_Spawner_Block leaves NO visible marker on this V2 generator path (vanilla crypt/goblin use it cleanly on the V1 path; the V2 paste is unverified). This JSON is not gradle-compiled.

WORLDGEN SHRINE HOSTS - SMALL CRYPTS (scatter): the furnace-baked copied-vanilla Tomb_Small crypts (Shrine_Crypt_01/02), scattered FREQUENTLY via the proven Mesh2D+Weighted shape (the trees/debris use this). The large crypt + the two corrupted houses scatter via the next two props (sparser, big footprints; the houses carry LoadEntities:true for their corrupted-Kweebec spawn markers). Scatter is best-effort now (LoadEntities:true so each host spawns a baked hidden shrine MARKER entity): ShrinePlacement force-loads the play core, queries the markers to learn the real count + positions, and runtime-tops-up only the MISSING ones (spaced) to guarantee >=ArenaLayout.SURFACE_WORLDGEN_SHRINES; the furnace is discovered via its interaction. Furnace is a baked 4-cell multiblock (renders correct). IN-GAME GATE: confirm hosts generate, the marker is detected, the round is winnable, and the biome is not all-air (a malformed Prefab prop airs out the whole biome). Not gradle-compiled.

WORLDGEN SHRINE HOSTS - LARGE CRYPT (scatter): the big furnace-baked Shrine_Crypt_Large, scattered (Scale 80 + SkipChance 0.65, ~2-3 per round - reliable presence without crowding) on its own prop so its ~29x29 footprint does not crowd/overlap the frequent small crypts. Same proven Prefab-prop shape; LoadEntities:true so the baked hidden shrine MARKER entity spawns (ShrinePlacement queries it to detect this host + top up any missing shrines); Floor pattern + ColumnLinear floor-snaps it onto Soil_Grass_Dry under Empty. A landmark shrine. IN-GAME GATE: confirm it floor-snaps without burying/floating on rolling terrain, and the marker is detected. Not gradle-compiled.

WORLDGEN SHRINE HOST - UNDERGROUND DUNGEON (scatter + CARVE): the furnace-baked multi-level descent Shrine_Dungeon_Underground_01, scattered RARELY (Scale 90 + SkipChance 0.7, ~1-2 per round) on its own prop because it is a big deep carve. UNLIKE the surface crypts this prefab DESCENDS: its anchor IS the surface ENTRANCE (anchorY 36) and the body extends DOWN ~36 blocks to the furnace chamber, the descent shaft authored as Empty cells. A Type:Prefab worldgen prop writes EVERY stored cell incl. Empty (decompile-verified: props.PrefabProp.place -> materialWriteSpace.set(material,pos) per cell, no air skip), so the Empty cells CARVE the descent straight out of the solid grove AT GENERATION TIME - the same carve the runtime cave-shaft seam did, now gen-time and reliable (no worldgen race, no force-paste). The Floor pattern + ColumnLinear scanner land the ENTRANCE flush on Soil_Grass_Dry under Empty; the body carves below into the dirt/rock (material runs to BottomY -80, far below the ~surface-36 chamber). LoadEntities:true spawns the baked hidden kn_shrine_marker entity (worldgen tags it FromWorldGen so ShrinePlacement detects it, tops up, and clusters surface Moonbloom at the entrance) and the dungeon self-bakes its own Moonbloom supply down the shaft. Furnace is a baked 4-cell multiblock, discovered via its interaction like every other host. Random directionality spins the footprint. IN-GAME GATE: confirm the entrance carves flush (not buried/floating) on rolling terrain, the descent is walkable to the furnace, the marker is detected, and the biome is not all-air (a malformed Prefab prop airs out the WHOLE biome). Not gradle-compiled.

DISABLED (Skip:true): the Kweebec houses were too big and the worldgen-spawned ambient corrupted Kweebecs (NPC_Spawn_Marker via LoadEntities:true) did not appear in-round, so the large crypt is the big landmark host instead. Kept here (skipped) for easy re-enable. WORLDGEN SHRINE HOSTS - CORRUPTED HOUSES (scatter, LoadEntities:true): the two furnace-baked copied-vanilla Kweebec medium houses (Shrine_House_01/02), scattered RARELY (Scale 80 + SkipChance 0.6) on their own prop so their tall ~25x33 footprint stays sparse. UNLIKE every other host prop this one sets LoadEntities:TRUE so the houses' baked NPC_Spawn_Marker entities spawn AMBIENT corrupted Kweebecs (their SpawnMarker ids were repointed to KweebecNightmare_Husk_Patrol -> KweebecNightmare_Blight) plus their patrol-path markers; the per-round instance is DeleteOnRemove so teardown cleans them. The baked Block_Spawner_Block (native Zone1_Kweebec_Tier1) randomizes a loot chest. IN-GAME GATE: confirm houses generate, corrupted Kweebecs spawn + despawn on teardown, and they do not swamp the controlled-hunter difficulty (tune weight / SkipChance / ExclusionRadius if so). Not gradle-compiled.
